title: Dir Sync
subtitle: Directory synchronization utility
description: A utility for comparing directories and copying file changes from one location to another.
Focused on making file synchronization easier, safer, and more reliable without requiring constant manual work.
features: Directory comparison for source and target locations
Automatic copy of new or changed files
Safer sync workflow that avoids unnecessary manual steps
statusDetails: Core sync workflow not yet documented in detail
Final behavior and storage flow may still change
